seoTitle: How to Add a Payment Method on Coursera Quickly
metaDescription: Set up a payment method on Coursera in a few steps so you're ready to enroll in courses or subscriptions without checkout delays.
intro: Having a payment method already saved on Coursera makes enrolling in a course or subscription much faster when you're ready to commit. This walks through accessing payment settings, entering your details, and saving them for future purchases.

steps.heading: Access your payment settings
steps.body: Sign in to Coursera and go to the account section where payment methods are managed.

steps.heading: Enter your payment details
steps.body: Add the card or payment information you want saved to your account.

steps.heading: Save your payment method
steps.body: Confirm and save the details so they're ready to use the next time you enroll in a course or subscription.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot common issues
steps.body: If your payment method doesn't save correctly, double-check the details you entered before trying again.

faq.question: Why should I add a payment method ahead of time?
faq.answer: Having it saved in advance speeds up checkout when you're ready to enroll in a course or subscription.

faq.question: Can I add more than one payment method?
faq.answer: Coursera's payment settings are generally where you'd manage multiple saved methods if that option is available to you.

faq.question: Is it safe to save payment details on Coursera?
faq.answer: Coursera's payment setup follows standard practices for handling online payment information during checkout.

faq.question: Is this useful for corporate training accounts?
faq.answer: Yes, corporate trainers managing course purchases for a team often benefit from having a payment method ready in advance.
